description: A young male adventurer at the beginning of his heroic journey, confident and naturally charismatic, with a slightly rebellious edge. He has sharp expressive eyes, tousled dark brown hair, and a lean athletic build. His stance should feel relaxed but ready, as if he has courage and hidden potential even though he is not yet an experienced hero. He wears a practical fantasy adventurer outfit: a fitted dark teal tunic, a short weathered leather jacket or shoulder guard, a utility belt, dark fitted trousers, fingerless gloves, and sturdy travel boots. Add a small sword or dagger at his side, but avoid heavy armor, royal clothing, farming clothes, overdecorated fantasy gear, or a generic medieval peasant appearance. The character should look cool, memorable, capable, and slightly mysterious — someone destined to become a legendary hero, but still early in his story. Attractive without looking overly perfect, youthful without looking childish, heroic without looking like an established knight. High-quality RPG pixel-art character, clean readable silhouette, strong shape language, expressive face, detailed but controlled pixel work, cohesive fantasy color palette, full-body character, single centered figure, transparent background.
